title: Orion Browser by Kagi
excerpt: Orion — A web browser designed from the ground-up. Native WebKit speed, compatibility with a wide selection of extensions, and absolute privacy — finally together in one browser that respects you.
content_html:
WebKit.Extensions.Privacy. Pick all three.

Orion — A web browser designed from the ground-up.

Native WebKit speed, compatibility with a wide selection of extensions, and absolute privacy — finally together in one browser that respects you.

for iPhone and iPad

Core features that make all the difference

Zero Compromise Privacy

Complete zero-telemetry browsing with built-in ad-blocking and anti-tracking. Pure WebKit engine, no AI data collection, no hidden surveillance.

Customize Everything Your Way

Limitless customization that goes far beyond themes. Configure every detail to work exactly as you need.

Curated Extension Support

The only browser supporting Safari, Chrome, and Firefox extensions. We've curated 20 guaranteed-working extensions so you get the tools that matter, not the headaches.

Discover the Extensions

Kagi Services Built Right In

Seamless integration with all Kagi services directly in your browser. Search, translate, and browse with tools designed to work together perfectly.

Discover the Kagiverse

Orion for macOS

Our flagship browser, five years in the making. Built natively for Mac users who demand performance and control without compromise. The complete Orion experience, refined through years of community feedback.

Orion for iOS and iPadOS

Trusted by 4 million users who get features no other mobile browser offers. Native iOS performance with capabilities that redefine what's possible on mobile.

Orion for Linux

Currently in beta for users who value choice and independence.

Native Linux performance with the same zero-telemetry promise.

Built for those who refuse to compromise on privacy.

COMING SOON

Orion for Windows

Alpha version in active development. Native Windows integration without the usual browser bloat. Coming soon for users ready to break free from the big tech duopoly.

What people say

  • "Safari on MacOS is no more for me. I found Orion to be fast, easy on the battery, and far more flexible than Safari. To me, Orion is what Safari would be if Apple loosened the reins a bit."

  • "Orion delivers blazing speed while using a fraction of the resources. Despite its lightweight nature, it supports Chrome and Firefox extensions, giving you flexibility without the bloat."

  • "No data collection. No telemetry. No sponsored junk, partnerships or tie-ups. No incessant upsells. Software made to work for the people funding it."

Orion Plus

Support Independent Browsing

Orion is 100% funded by its users; no ads and no third party deals ever. Get Orion Plus and own your browser.

As a self-funded enterprise, our primary source of revenue comes directly from our users. To sustain the ongoing development of Orion, we currently offer it on a subscription basis or a convenient one-time lifetime license.

Learn more about Orion Plus

sentences.en: I found Orion to be fast, easy on the battery, and far more flexible than Safari.
sentences.zh: 我发现 Orion 速度快、省电，而且比 Safari 灵活得多。

sentences.en: To me, Orion is what Safari would be if Apple loosened the reins a bit."
sentences.zh: 对我来说，如果苹果稍微放松一下控制，Orion 就相当于 Safari。”

content_html_zh:
WebKit.Extensions.Privacy。 选择全部三个。

Orion — 一款从头开始设计的网络浏览器。

原生 WebKit 速度、与多种扩展的兼容性以及绝对的隐私 — 最终集中在一款尊重您的浏览器中。

适用于 iPhone 和 iPad

与众不同的核心功能

零泄露隐私

完全零遥测浏览，内置广告拦截和反跟踪。 纯WebKit引擎，无AI数据采集，无隐藏监控。

按照您的方式定制一切

无限的定制，远远超出主题。 配置每个细节，使其完全按照您的需要工作。

策划的扩展支持

唯一支持 Safari、Chrome 和 Firefox 扩展的浏览器。 我们策划了 20 个有保证的工作扩展，以便您获得重要的工具，而不是头痛。

Discover the Extensions

内置 Kagi 服务

直接在浏览器中与所有 Kagi 服务无缝集成。 使用旨在完美协作的工具进行搜索、翻译和浏览。

Discover the Kagiverse

macOS 版猎户座

我们的旗舰浏览器，历时五年打造。 专为要求性能和控制力而毫不妥协的 Mac 用户打造。 通过多年的社区反馈完善的完整 Orion 体验。

适用于 iOS 和 iPadOS 的 Orion

受到 400 万用户的信赖，获得其他移动浏览器无法提供的功能。 原生 iOS 性能以及重新定义移动设备可能性的功能。

Linux 版猎户座

目前处于测试阶段，适合重视选择和独立性的用户。

本机 Linux 性能具有相同的零遥测承诺。

专为那些拒绝在隐私方面妥协的人而设计。

即将推出

Windows 版猎户座

Alpha 版本正在积极开发中。 原生 Windows 集成，没有通常的浏览器膨胀。 即将推出，供准备摆脱大型科技双头垄断的用户使用。

人们怎么说

  • “MacOS 上的 Safari 不再适合我了。 我发现 Orion 速度快、省电，而且比 Safari 灵活得多。 对我来说，如果苹果稍微放松一下控制，Orion 就相当于 Safari。”
  • “Orion 在使用少量资源的情况下提供了惊人的速度。 尽管它具有轻量级的特性，但它支持 Chrome 和 Firefox 扩展，为您提供灵活性而不臃肿。”
  • “没有数据收集。 没有遥测。 没有赞助垃圾、合作伙伴或合作关系。 没有持续不断的加售。 软件是为资助它的人而设计的。”

猎户座加号

支持独立浏览

Orion 100% 由用户资助；没有广告，也没有第三方交易。 获取 Orion Plus 并拥有您的浏览器。

作为一家自筹资金的企业，我们的主要收入来源直接来自我们的用户。 为了维持 Orion 的持续发展，我们目前以订阅方式或方便的一次性终身许可证提供它。

Learn more about Orion Plus
